title: FMD - Both earbuds disconnected
scenario: Find My Device map shows three devices (case, left earbud, right earbud) for Voyager Free 60 Series but only two earbuds (no case) for Voyager Free 20 when disconnected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on your phone.
Ensure the Voyager Free 60 Series (Osprey) device is paired but currently disconnected from the phone.
Tap on the Find My Device feature.
Observe the map view showing device locations.
expected: For Voyager Free 60 Series (Osprey): The map should display three devices — the charging case, left earbud, and right earbud — all shown in a disconnected state.
